title: Mera Sound Sconce: A New Approach to Light and Sound
bodyHtml:
Mera Sound Sconce: A New Approach to Light and Sound

Great sound should be seen and heard.

The new Mera Sound Sconce combines high-performance audio with soft, dimmable lighting, adding both ambiance and immersive sound to your space.

Designed in collaboration with Mera Studio Architects, this wall-mounted speaker redefines how technology and design come together in the home.

‍

‍

Designed to Be a Statement, Not an Afterthought

Unlike traditional speakers that blend into the background, the Mera Sound Sconce is designed to be seen. With its artisan-crafted aluminum shell and custom-knit bouclé grille, it functions as both a sculptural lighting fixture and a high-fidelity speaker. According to Tara Marshall, Principal at Mera Studio Architects, the goal was to create a piece that transforms a room, not just with sound but with light:

“All too often, speakers are the last element considered in a space. We wanted to rethink the speaker and come up with a design that would shift the concept of the speaker from an afterthought to a forethought.”

‍

‍

High-Quality Sound With Warm, Dimmable Light

Beyond its modern aesthetic, the Mera Sound Sconce delivers impressive full-range audio with 3” ultra-thin woofers and 25mm cloth-dome tweeters. The integrated LED lighting, designed in partnership with American Lighting, provides both direct and indirect illumination, creating a soft glow behind the speaker grille and the shell.

Custom Finishes for a Natural Look

Available in **three hand-selected colorways—Linen, Black Sand, and Clay—**each finish was inspired by natural textures and tones. Whether you’re designing a minimalist space or a warm, inviting environment, the Mera Sound Sconce blends beautifully with different aesthetics.

‍

‍

Designed for Any Home

Whether you're building a new home or upgrading your current space, the Mera Sound Sconce is available for both new construction and retrofit installations. It also integrates with smart home automation systems, including Lutron, Control4, and Savant, making it easy to incorporate into your existing setup.

Available Now

The Mera Sound Sconce is available as a single unit, a pair, or bundled with the Sonos Amp for a complete, high-performance setup. If you're looking for a sophisticated way to add both light and sound to your home, this speaker offers a seamless blend of form and function.

‍
